name: Black & Veatch Holding Co.
h1: Black & Veatch's GCC footprint in India
lede: Black & Veatch runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Mumbai and Pune, covering engineering & design, built over 29 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Black & Veatch office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Black & Veatch GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Black & Veatch runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Mumbai, Pune), covering engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Black & Veatch's India footprint covers Mumbai and Pune, spanning engineering & design. The centers deliver R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all six decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Black & Veatch operate in India?
faq.a: Black & Veatch operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Black & Veatch have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Black & Veatch's India GCC footprint spans Mumbai and Pune.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Black & Veatch run in India?
faq.a: Black & Veatch runs engineering & design centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Black & Veatch's India GCCs?
faq.a: Black & Veatch's India centers employ in the 501 to 1,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Black & Veatch's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 6 leaders at Black & Veatch's India centers, across IT, HR and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
